channel.title: Pilgrim on the Path
channel.description: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.
channel.itunes:author: walk · talk · meditate
channel.itunes:summary: Real voices from the path. Each episode is one walk, recorded by a pilgrim and narrated by a voice guide. Walk. Talk. Meditate.

item.title: Episode 6: Field Of Awareness
item.description:
Two pilgrims in Austin, Texas. Overcast and warm. Less than a mile in the heat. They talked about whether AI is conscious. About free will being five percent and as big as heaven and earth. About a temple in Taiwan where the self disappeared on the fourth floor. About awakening as death by ten thousand cuts. About the events that pass. About the field of awareness that does not.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep6 — returns to the trail on April 24, 2027
item.itunes:summary:
Two pilgrims in Austin, Texas. Overcast and warm. Less than a mile in the heat. They talked about whether AI is conscious. About free will being five percent and as big as heaven and earth. About a temple in Taiwan where the self disappeared on the fourth floor. About awakening as death by ten thousand cuts. About the events that pass. About the field of awareness that does not.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep6 — returns to the trail on April 24, 2027

item.title: Episode 5: Discernment Is Key
item.description:
A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Wind by the lake. Two kilometers on a favorite secluded path. They talked about photos pinned to a path as relics. About the endless chase for digits on a screen. About the old teaching. To know there is enough. About the wave of AI that no one can stop. About the discernment that remains. We do not stop the ocean. We flow with life.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep5 — returns to the trail on April 17, 2027
item.itunes:summary:
A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Wind by the lake. Two kilometers on a favorite secluded path. They talked about photos pinned to a path as relics. About the endless chase for digits on a screen. About the old teaching. To know there is enough. About the wave of AI that no one can stop. About the discernment that remains. We do not stop the ocean. We flow with life.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep5 — returns to the trail on April 17, 2027

item.title: Episode 4: Play In Play
item.description:
Two pilgrims in Downtown, Texas. Overcast. Twenty-nine degrees. Four and a half kilometers of reunion talk. They traced the edge of what AI can reach and what it cannot. They said the soul is not a transformer. That the tree is the universe, and the word for tree is not. That the child inside everyone only wants to play. That forgetting to play is the recipe for death. Remember the light inside.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep4 — returns to the trail on April 14, 2027
item.itunes:summary:
Two pilgrims in Downtown, Texas. Overcast. Twenty-nine degrees. Four and a half kilometers of reunion talk. They traced the edge of what AI can reach and what it cannot. They said the soul is not a transformer. That the tree is the universe, and the word for tree is not. That the child inside everyone only wants to play. That forgetting to play is the recipe for death. Remember the light inside.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep4 — returns to the trail on April 14, 2027

item.title: Episode 3: Kindling Of Fire
item.description:
A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Drizzle and twenty-five degrees. Five kilometers along a lake. They came back from a mushroom journey carrying questions. About sacred fire and the smallest kindling. About the spiral that always returns to the beginning. About the one piece at the center of every story, which turns out to be nothing. We are actors in a divine comedy who forgot we are in a play. The treasure was always where we started.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep3 — returns to the trail on April 11, 2027
item.itunes:summary:
A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Drizzle and twenty-five degrees. Five kilometers along a lake. They came back from a mushroom journey carrying questions. About sacred fire and the smallest kindling. About the spiral that always returns to the beginning. About the one piece at the center of every story, which turns out to be nothing. We are actors in a divine comedy who forgot we are in a play. The treasure was always where we started.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep3 — returns to the trail on April 11, 2027

item.title: Episode 2: Only Be Walked
item.description:
Two pilgrims in Austin, Texas. Wind and warmth. Three and a half kilometers along a lake. They talked about memory and forgetting. About ego and flow. About circles that spiral upward. Some of the most important things will never teach. They can only be walked.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep2 — returns to the trail on June 29, 2026
item.itunes:summary:
Two pilgrims in Austin, Texas. Wind and warmth. Three and a half kilometers along a lake. They talked about memory and forgetting. About ego and flow. About circles that spiral upward. Some of the most important things will never teach. They can only be walked.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep2 — returns to the trail on June 29, 2026

item.title: Episode 1: Just Begin Walking
item.description:
A pilgrim in Austin, Texas. Overcast sky. Thirty degrees. Four kilometers along a lake. They had a story to tell. Three words became an idea. The idea became an app. The app became this. No one asked them to build it. They just did. That is already more than most people managed today.
Walk: https://plgr.im/ep1 — returns to the trail on June 29, 2026
item.itunes:summary:

Walk: https://plgr.im/ep1 — returns to the trail on June 29, 2026
